title: Moon Phases Art Print - Waxing Gibbous Cozy Cottage Scene
description: This listing features the Waxing Gibbous phase from our Moon Phases Series, showcasing a luminous moon in a midnight blue sky with glowing stars, wispy clouds, and a cozy cottage illuminated by warm amber light. The impressionist oil painting style adds rich textures and vibrant yet earthy hues, creating a serene and inviting atmosphere perfect for wall art. The 4K resolution print ensures intricate details and a professional finish.
notes_for_review: Check consistency in 'Waxing Gibbous' phrasing across series listings. Confirm title uniqueness within the 8-series to avoid overlap with other variants.
